module.name: bignumber
module.aiSpec: Showcase one headline statistic or KPI in large type with supporting text. Block module split by `<!-- @ -->` into up to three sections: section 1 = the big number/value (e.g. "98%"), section 2 = a label, section 3 = a smaller caption. Only the number is required; label and caption are optional. Example: `98%` `<!-- @ -->` `Customer satisfaction` `<!-- @ -->` `1,200 responses`.

snippet.label: Big Number
snippet.text: <!-- @bignumber color: var(--accent-color) --> 98% <!-- @ --> Customer satisfaction <!-- @ --> Measured across 1,200 responses <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Large statistic with label and caption
